backend/main.mo: Main actor defining video clip management, user profiles with roles and statuses, YouTube/Google OAuth integration, trending analytics, clip similarity scoring, and access control with authorization mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms old actor state to new schema by adding a default 'active' status field to all existing user profiles while preserving other data.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two implemented features: a UserStatusManagement component with status dropdown and a useSetUserStatus React hook for backend integration.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend components, hooks, and configuration files describing the React application structure, YouTube integration, clip management, OAuth flows, and admin functionality.
frontend/.env.example: Environment variable template with detailed step-by-step instructions for obtaining and configuring Google OAuth Client ID for YouTube API integration.
frontend/.gitignore: Git ignore configuration excluding node_modules, build artifacts, editor files, logs, and environment variable files from version control.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles with custom OKLCH color system defining light and dark mode design tokens for consistent theming across the application.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with 'Beast Clipping' title and root div for React application mounting.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component with routing, authentication flow, profile setup, video URL management, AI clip suggestions state, and layout integration for authenticated users.
Displays detailed authentication debug information for admins, including principal IDs, admin status, hash map size, and character-by-character string comparison for troubleshooting. Includes refresh functionality and clipboard copy features.
frontend/src/components/AdminErrorBounda: React error boundary component that catches and displays errors in the admin panel with detailed error messages, stack traces, and component stacks. Provides retry and home navigation options.
frontend/src/components/AdminList.tsx: Displays a list of current admin users with their principal IDs and generated short user IDs. Shows loading states, error handling, and empty states.
Form component for adding new admins by entering their full Principal ID. Includes validation, success/error alerts, and integrates the AdminList component.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Main admin dashboard that displays statistics, trending analytics, and collapsible sections for debug panel, admin management, and user status management. Includes loading and error states with retry functionality.
frontend/src/components/ChannelConnectio: Manages YouTube channel connection via Google OAuth, displaying connection status with channel avatar and name. Provides connect/disconnect functionality with loading states and error handling.
frontend/src/components/ClipCard.tsx: Displays a single video clip card with thumbnail, title, viral score badge, duration, and action buttons for deleting, posting to YouTube, and downloading. Includes YouTube channel connection status checks and alert dialogs for confirmations.
frontend/src/components/ClipList.tsx: Renders a scrollable list of saved video clips using ClipCard components, with loading states and empty state messaging. Handles clip selection and deletion through callbacks.
Displays either AI-generated clip suggestions or trending viral clips with viral scores, timestamps, and action buttons to apply suggestions. Switches between AI and trending modes based on available data.
frontend/src/components/ClipTimestampCon: Provides a form for creating video clips with title input and start/end timestamp controls (minutes and seconds). Handles clip creation, validation, and updates from selected clips or suggestions.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main application layout component with header navigation, authentication controls (Internet Identity login/logout), user role display, and conditional admin panel access. Includes debug logging for admin button visibility logic.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: First-time user profile setup form collecting name and email with validation. Saves user profile with default 'user' role and 'active' status, using a workaround to store email in the name field.
frontend/src/components/UserIdDisplay.ts: Displays the user's short ID and full principal with copy-to-clipboard buttons for both values. Shows visual feedback with checkmarks when copied.
frontend/src/components/UserRoleBadge.ts: Renders a styled badge component displaying user roles (Owner, Admin, User, Friend) with corresponding icons and color schemes. Supports three size variants.
frontend/src/components/UserStatusManage: Admin interface for managing user roles and account statuses with search functionality and dropdown selectors. Displays users in a table with real-time role and status updates.
frontend/src/components/VideoUrlForm.tsx: Form component for entering YouTube URLs with validation and video ID extraction. Includes an AI clip generation button that triggers after a video is loaded.
Displays a viral potential score badge with color-coded styling and icons based on score thresholds (high/medium/low). Supports multiple sizes and optional label display.
frontend/src/components/YouTubePlayer.ts: Embeds a YouTube video player in a responsive 16:9 aspect ratio card using an iframe with the YouTube embed API.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages the backend actor instance with authentication, handling both anonymous and authenticated states. Initializes access control with admin token and invalidates dependent queries on actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAddAdmin.ts: Mutation hook for adding admins by user ID, invalidating admin-related queries on success. Currently expects full principal text rather than short user IDs.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminDebug.ts: Fetches admin debug information including current principal, admin status, and admin list. Returns placeholder data for unimplemented backend methods.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminList.ts: Query hook that fetches the list of admin principals from the backend using the getAdminsAsAdmin method.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminStats.ts: Fetches admin statistics including total clips count and trending clip analytics with error handling and retry logic. Combines two separate queries with 10-second stale time.
Provides a mutation hook to auto-generate clip suggestions for a video, currently using mock AI data with viral scores but designed to integrate with real AI services through the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipCreation.ts: Mutation hook for creating video clips that calculates a viral score based on duration and title characteristics, then saves the clip via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useClips.ts: Query hook to fetch all clips and provides a mutation to delete clips, tracking deletion state per clip ID.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipTimestamps.ts: Manages state and validation for clip start/end timestamps in minutes and seconds format, providing conversion utilities and validation logic.
frontend/src/hooks/useDownloadClip.ts: Mutation hook that generates a download URL from the backend for a video clip segment and triggers browser download with a sanitized filename.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetOwnRole.ts: Query hook that fetches the current user's role from the backend, returning null on errors to handle cases where authenticated users don't have profiles yet.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useIsOwner.ts: Query hook that checks if the current user is an admin by calling the backend, with extensive logging for debugging authentication and authorization flow.
frontend/src/hooks/usePostToYouTube.ts: Mutation hook for posting clips to YouTube Shorts, validating OAuth connection and 60-second duration limit before calling the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of query and mutation hooks for user profile management, Google OAuth credential storage, and YouTube connection status checks.
frontend/src/hooks/useSetUserRole.ts: React hook that provides a mutation to update a user's role via the backend actor, invalidating relevant queries and showing toast notifications on success or error.
frontend/src/hooks/useSetUserStatus.ts: React hook that provides a mutation to update a user's status (active/inactive) via the backend actor, invalidating user-related queries and showing toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useTrendingClips.ts: React Query hook that fetches trending video clips from the backend actor when available.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserRoles.ts: React Query hook that fetches all user roles with their status and profile information, combining data from multiple backend calls.
frontend/src/hooks/useYouTubeChannel.ts: React hook managing YouTube channel connection status and OAuth flow, providing mutations to connect/disconnect Google accounts and query channel information.
Utility hook providing functions to validate YouTube URLs and extract video IDs from various YouTube URL formats.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark theme colors, including primary, secondary, accent, and chart colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/OAuthCallback.tsx: OAuth callback page that processes Google authorization codes, stores credentials via backend, and redirects users with appropriate success/error feedback.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/src/utils/userIdGenerator.ts: Generates deterministic 8-character user IDs from principal strings using a simple hash function.
frontend/src/utils/youtubeOAuthDebug.ts: Debugging utility class for tracking and logging YouTube OAuth flow events, validating responses, and identifying common error patterns.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system with CSS variables, container settings, border radius, Inter font family, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file for an admin panel status management feature, documenting two existing features (status dropdown and useSetUserStatus hook) and two pending feature requests related to admin user status changes.
